hypothesis: E-44: T=9 temporal probe. E-43 proved flatfish_2 failure is genuine hard camouflage (not label noise) — model detects presence but cannot delineate full extent of large well-camouflaged objects. Hypothesis: longer temporal context (9 frames vs 5, spanning 40 frames at 5-frame intervals) gives model more boundary evidence to accumulate, improving spatial delineation of large static camouflaged objects. All other params identical to E-39 (dense_fg_aux, lr=0.001, bs=16, 8ep, T_max=8). Eval criteria: flatfish_2 per-video mIoU improvement (primary), overall pf_mIoU stable or improved (secondary). If pf_mIoU > E-39 (0.8277) OR flatfish_2 mIoU > E-40 (0.215), direction is valid for 30ep verification.
head: dense_fg_aux
